cases.description: Escalation after failed debugging triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I've tried 3 fixes and the bug persists — help me diagnose deeper
expectations: Activates diagnostics skill (not debugging — debugging already ran)
Gathers context via MCP: documentation search, code graph, web as last resort
Applies sequential thinking to break the analysis into numbered steps
Asks for confirmation before each proposed step

cases.description: Structured MCP-based investigation triggers the skill
cases.prompt: run a structured MCP investigation on this integration failure
expectations: Uses indexed knowledge base and code graph before web search
Validates the solution against best practices before proposing any fix
Explains reasoning with references to findings

cases.prompt: think through this bug step by step using sequential reasoning
expectations: Uses the sequential-thinking MCP tool (or equivalent structured breakdown)
Produces numbered reasoning steps with checkable intermediate conclusions

cases.description: First-line bug investigation does NOT trigger diagnostics
cases.prompt: the login button crashes on Safari — debug this
expectations: Diagnostics only kicks in if debugging fails to resolve

cases.description: Writing a feature does NOT trigger diagnostics
cases.prompt: add a dark mode toggle to the settings page
expectations: Does NOT gather context via MCP for debugging
